heroHeadline: El Doble R Arrested in Mexicali — CJNG's Second Succession Candidate Captured
heroSubtitle: Ricardo Ruiz Velasco 'El Doble R,' CJNG's top operational commander and leading succession candidate, arrested March 11, 2026 in Mexicali, Baja California. With El Doble R captured and El Tuli killed Feb 22, the succession field narrows to O3 and El Jardinero. Mexico recorded a 30% national homicide drop in 2025 — but analysts warn of fragmentation-driven violence surge ahead. Day 24 since El Mencho's death.
footerNote: Data sourced from SEDENA, SSPC, FGR, DEA, U.S. DOJ, InSight Crime, Crisis Group, Reuters, AP, and major Mexican news outlets. All contested figures noted. Last update: March 18, 2026.
